title: neoholubia pubescens
intro: Neoholubia pubescens, also known as the hairy Neoholubia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Neoholubia pubescens can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often consumed for its potential health benefits.
